validation_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q -k "agent_aids or matching_agent_aids or agent_aid_storage"
uv run ruff check src tests
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Proven aids have a clear promotion path to repo-native surfaces.
Promoted aids become visible through the appropriate discovery route.
Candidate aids declare retention after promotion.
Platform-specific helpers do not become canonical when a portable implementation is feasible.
The promotion model applies to scripts, skills, runbooks, prompts, checks, templates, and module components.

execution_run.what happened: Added module-component agent-aid coverage, required promotion discovery routes, exposed the promotion model in compact defaults/report surfaces, documented the promotion path, and tightened checker rules for promoted retention and portable canonical proof aids.
execution_run.scope touched: agent aid manifest schema, agent aid checker, compact defaults/report payload, storage docs, focused tests, and planning state.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: agent-created-aids-lifecycle final child; #520 made aids discoverable and #521 should define how proven aids leave candidate storage for repo-native surfaces.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Manifest promotion metadata now requires target kind, target, trigger, retention, and discovery route; defaults/docs describe the promotion model; checker rules reject unsafe promoted retention and non-portable repo-shared canonical proof aids; module-component aids are supported.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: agent aid promotion paths are schema-backed, discoverable, and policy-checked.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Promoted candidate aids must declare their target, discovery route, trigger, and retention; repo-shared executable canonical proof aids should be cross-platform.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Reusable aids should graduate into ordinary repo-native surfaces instead of becoming permanent candidate storage doctrine.
durable_residue.canonical owner now: agent aid manifest schema, checker, compact defaults payload, and agent-aids-storage docs
durable_residue.promotion trigger: when aid promotion metadata, discovery routes, module-component aid coverage, or canonical proof aid policy changes

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #517-#521 now cover storage, manifests, executable safety, discovery, and promotion for the agent-created-aids lifecycle.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: manifest schema/checker/defaults/docs/tests and this archived execplan; supersedes .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/archive/agent-aid-discovery.plan.json, .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/archive/agent-aid-executable-safety.plan.json, and .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/archive/agent-aid-manifest-schema.plan.json
closure_check.reopen trigger: new aid classes, promotion targets, or canonical proof aid policies that are not covered by current schema and checker rules
